results.rendered_html:
sam-ā-√nī P. Ā. -nayati, ˚te, to lead or conduct together, join, unite, collect, assemble,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to lead anyone to another, unite one person (acc.) with another (instr. with or without saha),  ib. ;
to lead towards, bring near,  ib. ;
to bring home,  ib. ;
to pour together, mingle (liquids),  ŚBr. ;  KātyŚr. ;
to bring or offer (an oblation),  MBh.  :
Caus. -nāyayati (ind.p. -nāyya), to cause to be brought together or near, convoke, assemble,  MBh. ;  Hariv. ;  R.

samānī 1 P.
1 To join, unite, bring together; hasnau samānīya  R. 2. 64 ;  Ś. 5. 15. 
2 To fetch, bring;  R. 12. 78. 
3 To collect, assemble.
4 To bring or offer an oblation.
